Title: PickleScan's profile.run blocklist mismatch allows exec() bypass
Description: picklescan v1.0.3 blocks `profile.Profile.run` and `profile.Profile.runctx` but does NOT block the module-level `profile.run()` function. A malicious pickle calling `profile.run(statement)` achieves arbitrary code execution via `exec()` while picklescan reports 0 issues. This is because the blocklist entry `"Profile.run"` does not match the pickle global name `"run"`.
